title: Marketplace Manager - Goibibo Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Goibibo Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Goibibo Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Bhopal-based team.

About Goibibo Advisory Limited:
Goibibo Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goibibo Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
